name: Cha Jang Mein (Noodles with Black Bean Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup oyster, shiitake, or straw mushrooms, chopped
recipeInstructions:
Look for this at a Chinese or Korean Market. No substitutes!
1. Cut the pork into small pieces and marinate in soy sauce, rice wine, ginger, and garlic. Set aside.
2. In a wok, stir fry onion and zucchini over high heat. Do in batches if necessary. Remove and set aside.
3. Heat oil or shortening in the wok. Add cha jang paste and stir quickly to avoid burning. Stir for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add pork and stir fry until cooked (1-2 minutes). Then add vegetables and mix.
5. Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
6. Add shrimp, if using, and mix.
7. Mix corn starch with water in a bowl. Add to the wok and stir until thickened and bubbly.
8. Serve immediately over cooked noodles.
